title: taraxacum officinale var. genuinum
intro: Taraxacum officinale var. genuinum, commonly known as the genuine dandelion, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum officinale var. genuinum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and improve skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed raw or in capsule form, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
